title: phyllagathis erecta
intro: Phyllagathis erecta, also known as the tall phyllagathis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Phyllagathis erecta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
